center.name: Talamancan montane forests
center.summary: Talamancan montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Black guan、Buff-fronted quail-dove、Chiriqui quail-dove等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is a resident breeder within the Talamancan montane forests of Costa Rica and western Panama, where it occurs in the canopy, woodland edges, and clearings with trees typically from up to the timberline

birds.evidence: The spotted barbtail is found in evergreen montane forest : in the Talamancan montane forests and throughout the northern Andes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The streak-breasted treehunter is found in the Talamancan montane forests through most of Costa Rica and into Panama as far as Veraguas Province
